The absolute best part is its incredibly smart algorithm features like Discover Weekly always introduce me to amazing new tracks that perfectly match my vibe. I also love Spotify Connect, which lets me easily switch my music from my phone to my home speakers with just one tap.
usable_records.author: dinaqarmilla

usable_records.text: As someone who has been using this app since 2012 it is well worth it. The dj makes it the best part as it creates a radio setup just based on what you listen to and recommends new artists. the fact that I can also make and share Playlist with friends makes it so amazing. got one Playlist with 7000 songs so yea love the customization.

AND you cant even play music while on another app, I recommend Youtube Music instead, it ACTUALLY puts songs on that you want and you can listen to music while playing a game or whatever without having an ad every 5 minutes...
usable_records.author: The exploded Airstrike

usable_records.text: Spotify has completely elevated my music experience! The sound quality is superb, the playlist recommendations are incredibly accurate, and discovering new artists through Discover Weekly feels like magic. I also love the podcast library — everything is in one place. Spotify Premium is 100% worth it for offline listening and zero interruptions
usable_records.author: Katelyn Schutte

usable_records.text: I enjoy utilizing Spotify for many different purposes. I will spend my time listening to podcasts while doing monotonous tasks. Music for my drives, and the ads are much shorter than a radio station. Finally I finish my day with calming ambient sleep music. It's a great App!

usable_records.text: App wajib ada dalam fon! "Layan gila Spotify ni, terutamanya playlist 'Discover Weekly' dia. Macam tahu-tahu je mood kita tengah macam mana. Kualiti audio pun mantap, lepas tu boleh download dengar offline masa drive atau joging. Tak rugi bayar premium bulan-bulan, berbaloi teruk!"
